title: Rename 'Favorite AT Location' label and fix 'Actor not available' error in Add Entry form

requirements.summary: Rename the label 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' everywhere it appears in the frontend UI
acceptanceCriteria: The string 'Favorite AT Location' no longer appears anywhere in the UI
The label 'Favorite Location on the Trail' is displayed wherever the favorite place field is referenced in the AddEntryPage form
All other locations (detail page, feed badges, dialogs) that previously showed 'Favorite AT Location' now show 'Favorite Location on the Trail'

file_operations.description: Update all occurrences of 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' in form labels, placeholders, helper text, and button text for the favorite place search field and related UI elements
Update any labels or text that display 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' when showing entry details with favorite place data
Update any badges, tooltips, or labels that reference 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' in the feed entry preview cards
Update the favorite place field label from 'Favorite AT Location' to 'Favorite Location on the Trail' in the edit entry form

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Actor not available' error that occurs when adding a location while signing the guest book
acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user can add a location when signing the guest book without seeing any 'Actor not available' error
The add-entry form submission with a favorite location completes successfully and the entry appears in the feed with the location data
If the actor is not yet initialized, the UI shows an appropriate loading or login prompt rather than an error message

file_operations.description: Update the form submission handler to properly check actor availability before attempting to submit. Add conditional rendering to disable the submit button or show a loading state when the actor is fetching. Ensure the useAddEntry mutation hook properly handles actor initialization state from useActor before executing the mutation

Review and update the useAddEntry mutation hook to ensure it properly waits for actor availability and handles the case where actor is not yet initialized. Add proper error handling that provides user-friendly messages instead of exposing raw 'Actor not available' errors. Ensure the mutation is disabled when actorFetching is true
